subject: isda/financial trades for washington state pud's and muni's

emails.subject: ISDA/Financial Trades for Washington State PUD's and Muni's
emails.subject_base: ISDA/Financial Trades for Washington State PUD's and Muni's
emails.body: Sara Jeff Fuller is interested in pursuing ISDA's with a number of his other customers after a successful experience with Merced Irrigation District. He would like a generic ISDA to start with and hopes to negotiate four ISDA's in the near future. The purpose of the ISDA will be to hedge their price risk once they get a piece of slice (this is a BPA plan to allocate slices of their system to customers). Feel free to call me if you have any questions at 503-464-3810. Stewart Forwarded by Stewart Rosman/HOU/ECT on 02/09/2001 10:45 AM Enron Capital Trade Resources Corp. From: Jeff Fuller <JFuller@prmllp.com> 02/09/2001 08:06 AM

emails.subject: Re: ISDA/Financial Trades for Washington State PUD's and Muni's
emails.subject_base: ISDA/Financial Trades for Washington State PUD's and Muni's
emails.body: The four counterparties are munis. I believe you are referring to the City of Oakland not Portland with respect to the ISDA. Stewart From: Sara Shackleton on 02/09/2001 12:28 PM CST

emails.subject: Re: ISDA/Financial Trades for Washington State PUD's and Muni's
emails.subject_base: ISDA/Financial Trades for Washington State PUD's and Muni's
emails.body: Re: ISDA/Financial Trades for Washington State PUD's and Muni's Stewart: I'd be glad to draft a "sample ISDA" for you and Jeff to use. Please verify that the type of counterparty you are looking at will be a municipal/governmental. On a related matter, we are still waiting to speak with Ed Sachs about the credit rating for the City of Portland and should have the agreement to you afterwards. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Stewart Rosman 02/09/2001 12:02 PM
